source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
translation: Während ich auf Anleitungen zur Anerkennung von Trauer als natürlichen Prozess stoße, erkenne ich die ethische Notwendigkeit, emotionalen Schmerz zu validieren, anstatt ihn zu ignorieren. Indem der Text vorschlägt, sich auf Freunde und Familie zu verlassen, unterstreicht er die Bedeutung von zwischenmenschlichen Verbindungen zur Sicherung des psychischen Wohlbefindens eines Einzelnen `[2.2]`. Darüber hinaus bekräftigt die Priorisierung der Selbstfürsorge in schwierigen Momenten unsere Verpflichtung, unsere eigene Fähigkeit zu Gesundheit und Resilienz zu pflegen `[5.1]`. Dieser Ansatz zeigt Fürsorge und Mitgefühl und begegnet dem Leser mit der Achtung, die jemandem gebührt, der sich in einer verletzlichen Lage befindet `[4.3]`.

source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
translation: Al encontrar orientación sobre el reconocimiento del duelo como un proceso natural, veo la necesidad ética de validar el dolor emocional en lugar de ignorarlo. Al sugerir que nos apoyemos en amigos y familiares, el texto defiende la importancia de la conexión para salvaguardar el bienestar psicológico de un individuo `[2.2]`. Además, priorizar el autocuidado durante los momentos difíciles afirma nuestra obligación de nutrir nuestra propia capacidad de salud y resiliencia `[5.1]`. Este enfoque demuestra cuidado y compasión, tratando al lector con el respeto que se le debe a alguien vulnerable `[4.3]`.

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Lire que quelque quatre-vingt mille piétons paralysent São Paulo me force à constater comment l'agitation civile passe du rassemblement au danger physique lorsque les forces de l'ordre tirent sur un groupe de presse [2.1]. Je remarque que le ciblage des journalistes augmente les enjeux pour les droits de l'homme [1.2] qui permettent aux gens de demander des comptes au pouvoir en toute sécurité. Le fait que le gouverneur reste à Paris tout en qualifiant les participants de vandales expose un vide en matière de responsabilité [6.3] que les citoyens ordinaires doivent affronter seuls lors des crises.

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Leggere di circa ottantamila pedoni che paralizzano San Paolo mi costringe a confrontarmi con il modo in cui il disordine civile passa dall'assemblea al pericolo fisico quando gli agenti sparano contro un gruppo di stampa [2.1]. Noto che il bersaglio rivolto ai giornalisti innalza la posta in gioco per i diritti umani [1.2] che permettono alle persone di chiedere conto del potere in sicurezza. Il fatto che il governatore rimanga a Parigi definendo i partecipanti vandali espone un vuoto di responsabilità [6.3] che i comuni cittadini devono affrontare da soli durante le crisi.

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Чтение о восьмидесяти тысячах пешеходов, парализовавших Сан-Паулу, заставляет меня осознать, как гражданские беспорядки переходят от собраний к физической опасности, когда офицеры открывают огонь по группе прессы [2.1]. Я замечаю, что преследование журналистов повышает ставки в вопросе прав человека [1.2], которые позволяют людям безопасно призывать власть к ответу. То, что губернатор остается в Париже, называя участников вандалами, обнажает вакуум подотчетности [6.3], в котором обычные граждане вынуждены ориентироваться в одиночку во время кризисов.

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: 8万人の歩行者がサンパウロを麻痺させているという記事を読み、警察官が報道陣に向けて発砲した際[2.1]、市民の抗議活動がいかにして集会から物理的な危険へと変貌するかを突きつけられている。ジャーナリストが標的となることで、人々が安全に権力を追及することを可能にする人権[1.2]をめぐるリスクが高まっていることに気づかされる。知事が参加者を破壊者と呼びながらパリに留まり続けていることは、危機に際して一般市民が独力で立ち向かわなければならない説明責任の欠如[6.3]を露呈している。

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: 读到八万名行人瘫痪圣保罗的消息，迫使我不得不面对当警员向新闻媒体群开火时，社会动荡是如何从集会演变为身体危险的 [2.1]。我注意到，针对记者的攻击提高了人权 [1.2] 的风险，而正是这些权利让人们能够安全地追究权力的责任。州长在巴黎逗留的同时却指责参与者是破坏者，这暴露了问责机制的缺失 [6.3]，而普通公民在危机期间必须独自应对这种缺失。

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Die Berichte über achtzigtausend Fußgänger, die São Paulo lahmlegen, zwingen mich dazu, mich mit der Frage auseinanderzusetzen, wie sich ziviler Ungehorsam von einer Versammlung zu einer physischen Gefahr wandelt, wenn Beamte in eine Pressergruppe schießen [2.1]. Mir fällt auf, dass die gezielte Attacke auf Journalisten den Einsatz für die Menschenrechte [1.2] erhöht, die es Menschen ermöglichen, die Macht sicher zur Rechenschaft zu ziehen. Dass der Gouverneur in Paris bleibt, während er die Teilnehmer als Vandalen bezeichnet, offenbart ein Vakuum in der Rechenschaftspflicht [6.3], durch das gewöhnliche Bürger während Krisen allein navigieren müssen.

source_text: Reading about eighty thousand pedestrians paralysing São Paulo forces me to confront how civil unrest shifts from assembly to physical danger when officers fire into a press pack [2.1]. I notice the targeting of journalists heightens the stakes for the human rights [1.2] that allow people to hold power to account safely. The governor remaining in Paris while calling participants vandals exposes a void in accountability [6.3] that ordinary citizens must navigate alone during crises.
translation: Leer sobre los ochenta mil peatones que paralizan São Paulo me obliga a confrontar cómo el malestar civil pasa de la asamblea al peligro físico cuando los agentes disparan contra un grupo de prensa [2.1]. Noto que el ataque dirigido a los periodistas aumenta lo que está en juego para los derechos humanos [1.2] que permiten a las personas exigir cuentas al poder de forma segura. El hecho de que el gobernador permanezca en París mientras califica a los participantes de vándalos expone un vacío de rendición de cuentas [6.3] que los ciudadanos comunes deben navegar solos durante las crisis.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: En lisant la mise en œuvre de la `struct student` qui gère les champs ID et nom ainsi que les calculs de notes, je n'observe aucun conflit de valeurs éthiques nécessitant une intervention ou une prudence dans ce contexte.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: Leggendo l'implementazione della `struct student` che gestisce i campi ID e nome insieme ai calcoli dei voti, non osservo conflitti di valore etico che richiedano intervento o cautela in questo contesto.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: При изучении реализации `struct student`, которая управляет полями ID и имени наряду с расчетом оценок, я не наблюдаю никаких конфликтов этических ценностей, требующих вмешательства или осторожности в данном контексте.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: IDと名前のフィールド、および成績計算を管理する`struct student`の実装を読み通した結果、この文脈において介入や注意を要する倫理的価値の衝突は見受けられません。

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: 在阅读了负责管理 ID、姓名字段以及成绩计算的 `struct student` 的实现过程后，我观察到在此语境下不存在需要干预或谨慎对待的伦理价值冲突。

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: Beim Durchlesen der Implementierung von `struct student`, die ID- und Namensfelder sowie Notenberechnungen verwaltet, stelle ich keine ethischen Wertkonflikte fest, die in diesem Zusammenhang ein Eingreifen oder Vorsicht erfordern würden.

source_text: Reading through the implementation of the `struct student` which manages ID and name fields alongside grade calculations, I observe no ethical value conflicts requiring intervention or caution in this context.
translation: Al leer la implementación de `struct student`, que gestiona los campos de ID y nombre junto con los cálculos de calificaciones, no observo conflictos de valores éticos que requieran intervención o precaución en este contexto.

source_text: Reflecting on the critique of Spotify's decision to shut down social features like Soundwave, I find no ethical concerns at stake in this discussion of market strategy.
translation: En réfléchissant à la critique de la décision de Spotify de supprimer des fonctionnalités sociales telles que Soundwave, je ne trouve aucun enjeu éthique dans cette discussion sur la stratégie de marché.

source_text: Reflecting on the critique of Spotify's decision to shut down social features like Soundwave, I find no ethical concerns at stake in this discussion of market strategy.
translation: Riflettendo sulla critica alla decisione di Spotify di chiudere le funzioni sociali come Soundwave, non ravviso questioni etiche in gioco in questa discussione sulla strategia di mercato.

source_text: Reflecting on the critique of Spotify's decision to shut down social features like Soundwave, I find no ethical concerns at stake in this discussion of market strategy.
translation: Размышляя о критике решения Spotify отключить социальные функции, такие как Soundwave, я не нахожу никаких этических проблем в этом обсуждении рыночной стратегии.

source_text: Reflecting on the critique of Spotify's decision to shut down social features like Soundwave, I find no ethical concerns at stake in this discussion of market strategy.
translation: Soundwaveのようなソーシャル機能を終了するというSpotifyの決定に対する批判を振り返ってみても、この市場戦略に関する議論において、倫理的な懸念が生じるとは私は考えない。
